response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience, strong TypeScript and React knowledge, and a proven track record of building scalable systems. While his experience leans toward senior-level roles, his adaptability, open-source contributions, and pragmatic approach to software architecture align well with the Junior/Mid-Level Fullstack Developer role. His background in renewable energy-adjacent projects (e.g., GISCollective) and AWS/CDK usage is a notable strength.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience with fullstack project ownership (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz).
Proven scalability expertise, including high-traffic systems (e.g., Dunnhumby) and Kubernetes deployment (GISCollective).
Diverse tech stack adaptability (Node.js, DLang, Java, PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and pragmatic tool selection.
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role due to extensive senior-level experience (10+ years) and leadership positions.
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js, though he has worked with similar relational databases (MySQL).
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with current Berlin-based roles, though relocation is feasible.
